name: tagit-indexer
description: Graph Protocol subgraph for TAGIT ERC-8004 agent contracts

scripts.build:arbitrum: graph codegen subgraph-arbitrum.yaml && graph build subgraph-arbitrum.yaml
scripts.deploy:arbitrum: graph codegen subgraph-arbitrum.yaml && graph build subgraph-arbitrum.yaml && goldsky subgraph deploy tagit-core-arbitrum/0.1.0 --path .
